channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Double XP Returns To RuneScape Today, With Some Big Changes
item.content:encoded:
Double XP has returned to RuneScape, letting players pick up extra XP for any classes they wish for a limited time, with some major changes this time around. This is the first time the event has been held since November, with Jagex making changes around systems such as microtransactions. 

How it works is that players get a 48-hour XP boost that can be activated or deactivated at any time between now and May 10. They emphasize that you can deactivate it in the case you’re doing activities that aren’t necessarily tied to XP. 

The developers have noted three major changes this time around: 

  • Daily login incentives tied to this event have been removed in the DailyScape changes.
  • This is the last event where tokens will be given away; they will be converted to GP at the end, so you'll need to use them in the store. Mainly because:
  • The DXP Store is making its final appearance with limited stock. The Skilling Outfits within will be obtainable through other methods in the future. 

In addition, the team is welcoming back players who literally haven’t played RuneScape since the last Double XP event by giving a full blog about what’s changed since then, including the Treasure Hunter removal, a new area, some XP rate boosts and more. 

There are more changes coming down the road in Runescape, too, as yesterday they unveiled a roadmap sharing the general release schedule for May’s content, including a Dungeoneering “Remaster” and the long-awaited new Player Avatar revamp. This week, there were also some visual changes to declutter combat. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/double-xp-returns-to-runescape-today-with-some-big-changes-2000137961
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Preview Update 7.9, 'Legacy Reborn' and Everything Coming to Star Wars: The Old Republic
item.content:encoded:
Legacy of the Sith is coming to an end soon, with a new era for Star Wars: The Old Republic. The team streamed a look at what’s coming in 7.9, “Legacy Reborn, from new story to PvP Season 10, Galactic Season 11, along with all of the May the 4th bonuses.

If you haven’t played through Master’s Enigma, there are some big story spoilers from the team as to what’s ahead, which makes sense as we’re coming to the end of a very long arc. Briefly, Darth Nul’s holocron has been stolen, and a big confrontation awaits on Kar Shian. This confrontation features a new type of gameplay, where you will take the perspective of different characters during the final showdown. 

In 7.9, there are some quality of life updates as well. The companion terminal will be disabled and all companions that are narratively unavailable will still be available for gameplay under a new tab, to organize everything in a clearer way. The Wreckage on Dantooine intro mission will get clearer onboarding, tweaks to progression requirements, and a way to skip the mission on future runs. 

PvP Season 10, “Honor in Battle” will run for 16 weeks, And there are new rewards including armor, decorations, titles, achievements, and more. Galactic Season 11, “Light and Shadow”  is also on the way,  once again featuring returning rewards from older seasons as well as a slate of all new rewards. 

Star Wars Day bonuses start today and run through May 22nd and include a double XP event, 50% off collection unlocks, all items that are”inspired by”  at up to 75% off, as well as an introduction of new rewards inspired by the film Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu. All players can get a BX-RC Probe Droid minipet and active subscribers can also get the Vectron Phantom RC2 mount. There are also new Cartel Market items inspired by the film.

The next stream will be completely about 8.0 and the next era of Star Wars: The Old Republic,  but in this stream we get a taste of what's coming:

  • The next Era of SWTOR’s story 
  • Level cap increase to 85 
  • Updates to Gearing Combat Balance and new abilities 
  • New 3-boss Operation Launching with Story and Veteran Modes 
  • New Planet: The Twi’lek home world of Ryloth Includes Dynamic Encounters 

You can watch the full stream above for more details and to  get a first peek at what's on the way. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/preview-update-79-legacy-reborn-and-everything-coming-to-star-wars-the-old-republic-2000137960
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Star Citizen's DefenseCon May Very Well Be Replacing This Year's Big Free Joy Ride Event
item.content:encoded:
A returning “convention” to give ships a go in Star Citizen has been announced—and it may very well be replacing the bigguns. 

Drake Interplanetary’s DefenseCon is making a comeback this year, touting some everyman defense ships to give a go (and some sales, if you’re that kind of player). However, this year. it’s suspiciously during the same annual slot where Invictus Launch Week would happen, in the mid-to-late May slot from May 14 to 27. 

So wait, where’s Invictus Launch Week? Great question—it’s taking place canonically this year in our real solar system, titled Sol in Star Citizen. The kicker is that technically, Sol isn’t even playable yet, which means Invictus Launch Week is quite literally beyond our reach as Star Citizens. Ergo, we can’t attend, but Drake Planetary, the everyday spaceship company it is, has everyone’s backs. 

“When the UEE pulled Invictus back to Sol, DefenseCon didn’t wait for orders, it stepped up,” the  official DefenseCon site outs as a rallying cry.  

There’s a bit of a weird history with this one. Basically, Drake Interplanetary, which holds DefenseCon, is one of the larger military spaceship corps in the Star Citizen universe, as it appeals to more pilots due to its wider spread of affordable supplies. However, they’re not usually included in the big fancy Invictus Launch Week that happens every year due to their reputation for supplying militias and pirates. 

DefenseCon is a direct response to that exclusion, taking place literally during Invictus Launch Week out of spite, and it certainly shows in the tone of the event. Last year was the only exception to the DefenseCon counter-programming, as Drake was actually included in Invictus Launch Week. Maybe the UEE’s having post-date regrets. 

This time, it’s somewhat vague if there’s a free fly as a part of it. They do imply that you can always just make a new character to give the event a go, but the “Free Fly” terminology isn’t attached to it (yet), so we’ll see. But given it’s during the usual time of year where the Free Fly happens, it’s entirely possible we see it come back. 

Star Citizen is currently working through its alpha 4.7 patches, with the primary 4.7.0 patch adding crafting and a recent 4.7.2 patch adding over 100 quests.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/star-citizens-defensecon-may-very-well-be-replacing-this-years-big-free-joy-ride-event-2000137959
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Rivendell Housing is Here in The Lord of the Rings Online
item.content:encoded:
Rivendell housing has arrived in The Lord of the Rings Online. Unsurprisingly, demand has been high, especially on Peregrin, since they became available yesterday at noon Eastern.

With the arrival of housing, 15 neighborhoods were available to purchase Rivendell Steadings within. To get one, you can access the available neighborhood from Bree-town through the Broker’s office or from the Rivendell steadings Broker’s Board. After speaking with the broker you can get a quest and tour the neighborhood, exploring to familiarize yourself with the neighborhood, examine available spaces, and your options. 

In every neighborhood, there are two standard homes, four deluxe homes, and a kinship home. If your kinship is rank 7 or higher you can purchase a home for all, but each kinship is limited to one home,  so be very sure it's what you want.

Each home has a list of standard features, from exterior and interior to a personal mail box, and a series of hook features for  mobile yard, ambient environment, music, furniture, floor, wall, and ceiling, as well as wall surface and paint. lighting, and more. Rivendell Steadings Adds two new types of hooks into the housing system and these are present in the Rivendell houses as well. These are ceiling surface and paint hooks. 

Once you got your house, then you can take advantage of the new Rivendell and Elf themed decorations from Update 48, and other ways to make your house your own. You can see the full info on houses, how to get them, and more here.

This is the initial group because they're rolling things out over time and for the first week the threshold to generate new layers is operating at a reduced level to help them meet the demand. Of course they knew there would be quite a bit of demand. 

Standing Stone Games later updated after the release that they had temporarily disabled sales on Peregrin to let the system catch up because the demand was so high. However, They were able to address the situation quickly and later updated again to say that housing brokers and purchases were back on Peregrin and remain available on other servers.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/rivendell-housing-is-here-in-the-lord-of-the-rings-online-2000137958
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
